title: Dev v0.5.0 Clean Dev Roles
notes:
Starts the shared Dev + Master workflow by removing Publish/Updates from Dev and adding a Shared Dev Tools foundation page with placeholders for shared database refresh/save and Master submissions.

Changes:
- Removes Publish tab from Dev
- Removes Updates tab from Dev
- Adds Shared Dev Tools tab
- Adds placeholder cards for Refresh Shared Database
- Adds placeholder cards for Save All to Shared Database
- Adds placeholder cards for Submit Update to Master
- Adds placeholder cards for Conflict Review, Shared Save Report, and Dev Identity
- Keeps all controls disabled for now so this update is safe
- Publishing belongs in Master
- App updating belongs in Launcher
